creator: kkennawa@physics.adelaide.edu.au
text:
On Sat, 19 Dec 1998 brett@peloton.physics.montana.edu wrote:

> 	update of afterstep-devel port to 1.6.0.  This should probably
> 	be made a new port category for 1.6.0 and the 
> 	afterstep-devel category should probably go away.  

Or just upgrade x11-wm/afterstep, which has been stuck at 1.0 for a couple of
years. I asked the maintainer of that port (jfitz) a few days ago but haven't
heard back from him.

Note to others that this release has an annoying bug wherein exiting the cvsup
gui will crash the WM. I've yet to receive useful feedback from the afterstep
developers on this..

While I'm here: Brett, could you confirm whether as1.6 has the same problems
for you?

Kris
